Currently Building

Michael Zhilinsky

I'm a 16-year-old developer and ML intern based in San Jose, CA — building at the intersection of AI, robotics, and software. Currently working on robot manipulation systems at Mind Robotics, where I train imitation learning policies and build tools for teleoperated data collection.

Junior at Monta Vista High School and concurrent student at De Anza College. When I'm not at the internship, I'm shipping apps, building 3D robotics visualizations, and exploring what's next in applied AI.

What I've Built

Interactive Projects

Three.js 3D / WebGL Teleop
3D Robot Arm

Interactive 6-DOF robot arm in the browser. Control joint angles, run a demo sequence, and orbit the model in real time — built to visualize the kind of teleop systems I work with at Mind Robotics.

▶ Live Demo ⌥ Source
Three.js 3D / WebGL Kinematics
3D Robot Hand

Articulated 5-finger humanoid hand with per-joint grasp animation and object interaction. Select an object — Apple, Fork, or Rubik's Cube — and watch the hand wrap around it with realistic finger curl kinematics.

▶ Live Demo ⌥ Source
What I've Built

Applied AI

AI / LLM Vanilla JS Healthcare
Luminary Genetics — AI Patient Receptionist
Luminary Genetics had a 1.7 ★ Google rating — overwhelmingly driven by patient communication complaints. I built a branded AI receptionist to handle appointment scheduling, insurance & billing questions, and patient FAQs, with triage logic to escalate urgent symptoms. Pitched the project directly to the CEO.
► Live Demo ⌥ Source
What I've Built

App Development

FoodSwipe

iOS · Backend · UI/UX

Swipe-based food discovery app — Tinder for takeout. Users swipe through dishes (not restaurants), and the app surfaces local options that match. Commission-per-order monetization model. I designed the full UI/UX, built the backend, and developed the web app. Founded August 2024. Currently in development.

React Native Node.js UI/UX Design

TeacherHours

iOS · Backend · UI/UX

App that streamlines teacher office hours — students book slots, teachers manage availability, and schools get visibility into engagement. Designed to replace the group-chat chaos of "when are you free?" I built the backend, web app, and UI/UX. Currently in development, with early interest from school board members and neighboring districts.

React Native Node.js UI/UX Design
Where I've Worked

Experience

Summer 2026
Mind Robotics
ML Intern

Logged 500+ training episodes in 3 days — 4.8× the output rate of other operators — and hold the fastest recorded time for every task on the internal leaderboard. Designed 10+ task environments, trained manipulation policies via imitation learning and behavior cloning, improved the teleoperation UI, and identified critical hardware issues coordinated with the engineering team.

Imitation Learning Behavior Cloning Robot Teleoperation Data Curation
Spring 2026
Luminary Genetics
Intern

Accelerated the embryo data analysis pipeline by ~30%, reducing time from data intake to result output. Proposed and scoped an anomaly detection system to flag irregular patterns in genetic datasets, enabling earlier identification of data quality issues.

Bioinformatics Anomaly Detection AI in Life Sciences
